content: {"businessRules": ["Matching Engine 7-pass strategy: AUTO_COMPLETE (1.0), HARD_REF (0.95), EXACT_SUM (1.0), PRICE_FLEX (0.85), WILDCARDS (0.80), TOLERANCE (0.70), CASH_FILL (0.50).", "Implements stock limit checks and allows/disallows negative stock based on configuration.", "Automatic decomposition in createLine when physical stock is insufficient."], "business_logic": "Implementa la l\u00f3gica central de reconciliaci\u00f3n de transacciones bancarias con productos del cat\u00e1logo, manejando descomposiciones y ajustes de precio.", "dependencies": [], "domain": "Engine", "exports": ["MatchingResult", "DEFAULT_MATCHING_RULES", "MatchingEngine"], "id": "src/lib/ipv/engine.ts", "name": "engine.ts", "technical_description": "Motor de conciliaci\u00f3n IPV (Inventario vs Venta). Ejecuta algoritmos de cuadre multi-paso.", "user_description": "M\u00f3dulo del sistema para gestionar engine.ts."}
